text.operational_en: Clearly say no and preserve the same boundary.
Step back physically and preserve the same boundary.

uncertainty.operational_en: Boundary setting is clear, but the mode of execution is not determined.

text.operational_en: A crossing of personal space brings strong tension.
There is a clear need to protect the same personal boundary.
There is a clear impulse to set boundary.
No signal selects a verbal or physical response.
